name: Whim of the Hive

abilities.name: Forced Reaction
abilities.text: After an enemy model with a Parasite token cheats fate (or declines to), one model with this ability may drain a (soulstone) to reduce that enemy model's final duel total by 2.

actions.name: Soul Shock
actions.effects: Enemy models within range must pass a TN 12 Wp duel or gain a Parasite token and be dealt 1 damage. Summon an Eyes and Ears in base contact with models killed by this action.

triggers.name: Unfair Play
triggers.text: One enemy model within range gains a Parasite token.

extraction_notes: The Parasite token is referenced in abilities but not defined on this crew card - likely defined elsewhere in the rules or on another card
